rows.need: avoid committing modal/uncertain statements as confirmed facts
rows.title: Ambiguous Modal Guard

rows.need: bind appositive definitions to the named entity they qualify
rows.title: Noun Apposition Definition Lens

rows.need: avoid treating examples as an exhaustive list
rows.title: Example Non-Exhaustive Guard

rows.need: keep contrasting properties attached to the same entity instead of splitting subject context
rows.title: Contrast Same Entity Lens

rows.need: preserve list item boundaries so properties do not leak between items
rows.title: List Scope Boundary Lens

rows.need: ground availability/capability claims to the correct system or context
rows.title: Availability / Capability Lens

rows.need: bind outcome words to the named event or run they describe
rows.title: Named Event / Outcome Lens

rows.need: bind numeric values and units to the correct subject
rows.title: Numeric Unit / Subject Lens

rows.need: avoid treating planned future work as completed evidence
rows.title: Planned vs Completed Guard

rows.need: keep quoted or attributed content from becoming directly endorsed Ground truth
rows.title: Quote Not Endorsement Guard

rows.need: preserve multi-hop causal chains without collapsing intermediate links
rows.title: Causal Chain Multi-Hop Lens

rows.need: bind positive results to their caveats and limits
rows.title: Result / Limitation Pair Lens

rows.need: preserve preconditions before allowing a procedure step to execute
rows.title: Procedure Precondition Lens

rows.need: preserve stacked qualifiers and negation polarity before commit
rows.title: Qualifier / Negation Stack Guard

rows.need: bind source claims to their recency and avoid stale-source reuse
rows.title: Source Recency Lens

rows.need: ground category membership without turning examples into exhaustive definitions
rows.title: Category / Member Relation Lens
